creator: g.roseman@mailbox.org
text:
2021Q4 quarterly ports still has libfabric-1.13.1, which fails to build with fetch failure:

As of 20 Nov poudriere build with FreeBSD 13_0 and ports 2021Q4 fails with:

=> ofiwg-libfabric-v1.13.1_GH0.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /portdistfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch https://codeload.github.com/ofiwg/libfabric/tar.gz/v1.13.1?dummy=/ofiwg-libfabric-v1.13.1_GH0.tar.gz
fetch: https://codeload.github.com/ofiwg/libfabric/tar.gz/v1.13.1?dummy=/ofiwg-libfabric-v1.13.1_GH0.tar.gz: size unknown
fetch: https://codeload.github.com/ofiwg/libfabric/tar.gz/v1.13.1?dummy=/ofiwg-libfabric-v1.13.1_GH0.tar.gz: size of remote file is not known
ofiwg-libfabric-v1.13.1_GH0.tar.gz                    2652 kB  405 kBps    07s
=> c2c317d6ccdacca3fcdcd7b1d3a91f47426246f4.patch doesn't seem to exist in /portdistfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch https://github.com/ofiwg/libfabric/commit/c2c317d6ccdacca3fcdcd7b1d3a91f47426246f4.patch
fetch: https://github.com/ofiwg/libfabric/commit/c2c317d6ccdacca3fcdcd7b1d3a91f47426246f4.patch: size mismatch: expected 2839, actual 2835
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/c2c317d6ccdacca3fcdcd7b1d3a91f47426246f4.patch
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/c2c317d6ccdacca3fcdcd7b1d3a91f47426246f4.patch: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /portdistfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1
